comments: Formal Ratification granted. The breach was confirmed not as 'unauthorized entry into M6', but as an overly broad interpretation of a narrow recovery directive for M6-A following a circuit breaker interruption. Option A (Formal Ratification) is selected. Hard Rollback is rejected. The ratification explicitly covers M6-B, M6-C, and the V0.7 retrospective/closure materials. The justification is that the unauthorized actions were self-reported, frozen, strictly limited to tasks/ documentation and JSON artifacts, caused no .agent-state/ migrations, no source code destruction, no core governance semantic tampering, and still underwent independent Gatekeeper review. The governance breach packet is to be permanently retained. The new Interrupted-Run Resumption Rule MUST be formally documented in the governance artifacts.
